sub_tasks.title: Verify Laptop Availability for New Hire 1
sub_tasks.description: Check inventory for an available laptop matching New Hire 1's requirements.

sub_tasks.title: Request Laptop Setup for New Hire 1
sub_tasks.description: Submit a request to IT for laptop imaging and software installation for New Hire 1.

sub_tasks.title: Order New Badges for New Hire 1
sub_tasks.description: Initiate the process for creating security badges for New Hire 1.

sub_tasks.title: Collect Stationery for New Hire 1
sub_tasks.description: Gather essential stationery items (pens, notebooks, folders) for New Hire 1's desk.

sub_tasks.title: Assemble Welcome Kit for New Hire 1
sub_tasks.description: Combine laptop, badges, stationery, and other welcome items into a complete kit.

sub_tasks.title: Coordinate Desk Setup for New Hire 1
sub_tasks.description: Liaise with facilities to ensure New Hire 1's desk is set up with monitor, keyboard, and mouse.

sub_tasks.title: Verify Software Licenses for New Hire 1
sub_tasks.description: Confirm that all necessary software licenses are allocated and ready for New Hire 1.

sub_tasks.title: Set Up Email and Communication Tools for New Hire 1
sub_tasks.description: Create email accounts and set up access to communication platforms (e.g., Slack, Teams) for New Hire 1.

sub_tasks.title: Schedule Initial Team Introductions for New Hire 1
sub_tasks.description: Arrange meetings for New Hire 1 to be introduced to their immediate team members.

sub_tasks.title: Confirm IT Access for New Hire 1
sub_tasks.description: Verify New Hire 1 has access to all required systems, network drives, and applications.

arban_allocations.title: Research Onboarding Procedures
arban_allocations.description: Search the knowledge base for standard onboarding procedures and guidelines.

arban_allocations.title: Gather Department Managers' Contact Information
arban_allocations.description: Look up contact details for relevant department managers.

arban_allocations.description: Check IT inventory for available laptops, monitors, and accessories.
